assay_description: Mouse liver microsomal stability of compound in microsomal protein, PBS buffer pH 7.4, NADPH, glucose-6-phosphate and glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase media. Aliquotes were taken at 5 time points and after stopping the reaction, supernatants were analyzed using HPLC coupled with a tandem mass spectrometer. The elimination constant, half-life, and intrinsic clearance are determined as results using linear regression analysis. The assay has been performed by Enamine biological services, Bienta Ltd.The protocol is publicly available: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5qpvokdb9l4o/v1

assay_description: Mouse liver microsomal stability of compound in microsomal protein, PBS buffer pH 7.4, NADPH, glucose-6-phosphate and glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase media. The elimination constant, half-life, and intrinsic clearance are determined as results using linear regression analysis.
